en_title: Apple Price Rises ‘Unavoidable’, Warns CEO Tim Cook
cn_title: 苹果CEO库克：产品涨价「不可避免」
subtitle: 内存涨价，无可避免
opus_summary: 苹果CEO库克警告，因内存和存储芯片成本持续飙升，涨价已「不可避免」。据TechInsights估算，iPhone 18 Pro组件成本可能从iPhone。

paragraphs.en: Apple boss Tim Cook has warned consumers that prices on some of its products will increase as the costs associated with memory and storage chips continue to surge. In a new interview with The Wall Street Journal , Cook declared such price rises were “unavoidable.”
paragraphs.cn: 苹果CEO蒂姆·库克警告消费者，随着内存和存储芯片成本持续飙升，公司部分产品将涨价。在接受《华尔街日报》的最新采访中，库克宣称这种涨价「不可避免」。

paragraphs.en: “We’re doing our best to mitigate the huge increases that are being passed to us, and we’ve been trying to shield our customers from the increases, but the situation has become unsustainable,” said Cook.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在尽最大努力消化转嫁给我们的巨额成本上涨，并一直努力保护消费者免受涨价影响，但局面已难以为继。」库克说道。

paragraphs.en: The boom in artificial intelligence and the explosive growth of the AI industry has come with enormous demand from the latter for memory components that consumer electronics need.
paragraphs.cn: 人工智能的蓬勃发展以及AI行业爆炸式的增长，导致该行业对消费电子产品所需的内存组件需求激增。

paragraphs.en: “There’s less supply at a time when consumers want devices and the memory guys are passing along huge price increases,” said Cook.
paragraphs.cn: 「消费者渴望入手设备，而供应却在缩紧，同时内存供应商还在大幅提价。」库克说。

paragraphs.en: According to estimates from research firm TechInsights, cited by The Wall Street Journal, components that previously cost Apple around $50 in the iPhone 17 Pro could be costing the company approximately $200 in the iPhone 18 Pro.
paragraphs.cn: 据《华尔街日报》援引研究公司TechInsights的估算，iPhone 17 Pro中原本成本约50美元(约合人民币338元)的组件，在iPhone 18 Pro中可能让苹果支付约200美元(约合人民币1352元)。

paragraphs.en: “We definitely need memory pricing and supply to return to reasonable levels for consumer products,” said Cook. “That’s the bottom line.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们确实需要内存定价和供应回归合理水平，才能面向消费者产品。」库克说，「这是底线。」

paragraphs.en: The news will come as a familiar refrain to gamers, who are unfortunately well accustomed to the impact of rising component costs on electronics. This generation, for the first time, gamers have seen console prices consistently jacked up rather than dropped.
paragraphs.cn: 这条新闻对玩家来说并不陌生，他们很不幸地早已习惯了零件价格上涨对电子设备的影响。这一世代，玩家们首次看到主机价格不断上涨而非下降。

paragraphs.en: The AI industry’s insatiable demand for memory is already impacting the next generation, too, with both Sony and Xbox expressing concern over the significant challenges of launching new consoles amid such unprecedented demand for memory and storage chips.
paragraphs.cn: AI行业对内存永无止境的需求也正影响到次世代主机，索尼和Xbox都表示担忧，认为在内存和存储芯片需求前所未有的情况下推出新主机面临重大挑战。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上找到他@mrlukereilly，问他些有的没的。
